2604.06789.title: Video-guided Machine Translation with Global Video Context
2604.06789.paper_summary: Video-guided Multimodal Translation (VMT) has advanced significantly in recent years. However, most existing methods rely on locally aligned video segments paired one-to-one with subtitles, limiting their ability to capture global narrative context across multiple segments in long videos. To overcome this limitation, we propose a globally video-guided multimodal translation framework that leverages a pretrained semantic encoder and vector database-based subtitle retrieval to construct a context set of video segments closely related to the target subtitle semantics. An attention mechanism is employed to focus on highly relevant visual content, while preserving the remaining video features to retain broader contextual information. Furthermore, we design a region-aware cross-modal attention mechanism to enhance semantic alignment during translation. Experiments on a large-scale documentary translation dataset demonstrate that our method significantly outperforms baseline models, highlighting its effectiveness in long-video scenarios.
2604.06789.paper_summary_zh: 視頻引導的多模態翻譯（VMT）在最近幾年取得了顯著進展。<lb/>然而，大多數現有方法依賴於與字幕一對一配對的本地對齊視頻片段，這限制了它們在長視頻中捕捉多個片段的全球敘事上下文的能力。<lb/>為了克服這一限制，我們提出了一個全球視頻引導的多模態翻譯框架，該框架利用預訓練的語義編碼器和基於向量數據庫的字幕檢索來構建與目標字幕語義密切相關的視頻片段上下文集。<lb/>我們採用了注意力機制，專注於高度相關的視覺內容，同時保留其餘視頻特徵以保持更廣泛的上下文信息。<lb/>此外，我們設計了一種區域感知的跨模態注意力機制，以增強翻譯過程中的語義對齊。<lb/>在大規模紀錄片翻譯數據集上的實驗表明，我們的方法顯著超越了基線模型，突顯了其在長視頻場景中的有效性。
2604.06789.author: Jian Chen et.al.
2604.06789.authors: Jian Chen, JinZe Lv, Zi Long, XiangHua Fu
